tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij tabelke, dobierajac okreslenia (A-L) odpowiadajace danej kategorii. Trzy okreslenia podano dodatkowo i nie pasuja one do zadnej kategorii.

options.text: Kruger National Park is a famous wildlife reserve in this country
Niagara Falls is partly located in this country
Nelson Mandela was the first democratic president of this country
The Taj Mahal is a famous white marble monument in this country
The kiwi is the national bird of this country
Bollywood is the largest film industry in this country
Haggis is a traditional dish of this country
Ottawa is the capital city of this country
The Ganges is considered a sacred river in this country
Table Mountain overlooks Cape Town in this country
The didgeridoo is a traditional instrument from this country
The maple leaf appears on this country's national flag
